{{CargoRelic
|name=Love Knot
|class_id=20649
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Also known as the Hercules Knot, it is regarded as a symbol of eternal unity.
|fame=19
|art=29
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=14
|ss1=Snail HP +200<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +4<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss2=Snail HP +400<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +8<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss3=Snail HP +600<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +12<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss4=Snail HP +600<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +12<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000
|ss7=Snail HP +600<br>Per 5k DNA Strength, Snail ATK +12<br>DNA Strength: 50000/50000<br> (Awakened)
}}
